text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki, one of Sakura Chiyono O's peers,
explains that she runs in races to hone her skills
for the sake of her grandfather, who is also her
martial arts teacher.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When compared to Yaeno Muteki's fierce
dedication, Sakura Chiyono O seems at first
glance to be lacking in intensity.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, the vigor with which she speaks of
Maruzensky and the Derby is passionate enough
to shock Yaeno Muteki.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O charges into her debut,
determined to work hard and accomplish her
dream!
